- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 为图像添加名称作为前缀
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Add a name to the images as prefix

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 为图像添加名称作为前缀 默认 = 图像
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Add a name to the images as prefix\n- Default = Image

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换到选中的场景并选择添加的摄像机
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches to the checked scene and selects the camera if added

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 如果需要相同的 “世界 ”属性，则会复制 3 个活动场景。
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Makes 3 copies of the active scene\n- If the same World properties are needed

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 在选中的场景中添加一个摄像机。
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Adds a camera to the checked scenes.\n- Selecting 4 scenes will enable this button
- Toggle resolution between 1080x1350 and 1920x1080\n- 1920x1080 is default

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 确认图像名称、渲染输出路径和分辨率
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Confirm the image name, render output path and resolution

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: 将 4 幅图像和一幅合并图像渲染到所选路径
- Select the path to store the rendered: Renders 4 images and a combined image to the selected path

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 删除所选场景中已添加的摄像机
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Deletes the added cameras of the selected scenes

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 添加面向选定对象的 4 个摄像机。
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Adds 4 cameras facing the selected object.\n- Select an object first to enable the button

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换到可启用景深和显示限制的前置摄像机
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches to the Front Camera where the Depth Of Field and Show Limits can be enabled

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换到顶部摄像机，启用景深和显示限制
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches to the Top Camera where the Depth Of Field and Show Limits can be enabled

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换到左侧摄像机，启用景深和显示限制
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches to the Left Camera where the Depth Of Field and Show Limits can be enabled

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换到可启用景深和 “显示限制 ”的右侧摄像机
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches to the Right Camera where the Depth Of Field and Show Limits can be enabled

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 切换回选择对象的场景 - 在此场景中，输出设置、渲染等按钮将启用
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Switches back to the scene where the object was selected\n- In this scene, the buttons for the Output settings, Render, etc...will be enabled

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: 按下按钮后，摄像机将跟踪新选定的对象
- Select the path to store the rendered: The cameras will track the newly selected object when pressed

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: 将光标移至原点并设置空位置
- Select the path to store the rendered: Move Cursor to Origin and Set Empty Position

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 按下此按钮后，摄像机将定位到所选对象
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Pressing this button will position the cameras to the selected object

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: 渲染 4 个摄像机的视图和视图的组合图像
- Select the path to store the rendered: Renders the 4 camera views and a combined image of the views

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 删除指定场景中添加的 4 个摄像机、链接的空和摄像机视图集合
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Deletes the 4 added cameras, linked empty, and CameraViews collections in specified scenes
Choose a name for the category of the panel

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 摄像机与空图像之间的距离，以毫米为单位
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Distance between camera and empty, in millimeters

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: - 添加摄像机时包含此场景
- Select the path to store the rendered: - Include this scene for adding cameras

- 选择存储渲染图像的路径: 渲染后打开渲染文件夹
- Select the path to store the rendered: Open the render folder after rendering
